S.FORM: Lee Aaker kawas tay 1943, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 9, Lee Aaker, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: lee aaker kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, lee aaker, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
